articles.author: Natalie Muller
articles.title: Trump says cutting US troops in Germany 'a lot further' - DW.com
articles.description: Germany's defense minister has said Europe needs to take more responsibility for its own security. Top Republicans warn reducing troop numbers sends the "wrong signal" to Russian President Vladimir Putin.
articles.content: US President Donald Trump has said he plans to cut the number of US troops stationed in Germany "a lot further," a day after the Defense Department ordered the pullback of around 5,000 American servi… [+4723 chars]
